summary: Hardware check flow verified after rollback restoration. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed: 1) Start Collection opens Hardware Check popup (first time for kit+shift), 2) Popup shows shift type (Morning/Night), 3) Popup requires 3 images (left glove, right glove, head camera), 4) Backend correctly rejects duplicate hardware checks for same kit+shift, 5) Different shifts allow separate hardware checks.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Hardware check flow correctly wired in openStartShift function (lines 670-710)
✓ hardwareCheckStatus state tracks per-kit, per-shift status: {kit: {morning: bool, evening: bool}}
✓ Backend POST /api/hardware-checks accepts shift_type field and rejects duplicates
✓ Frontend shows 'Morning Shift' or 'Night Shift' badge in hardware check dialog
✓ Frontend requires 3 images before allowing submission
✓ After hardware check submission, openStartShift is called to open collection form
seed_data_creation: Created test hardware checks for KIT-TEST-HW (morning and night shifts) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hardware check flow fully verified. Key test scenarios: 1) First click on Start Collection → opens Hardware Check popup, 2) Hardware Check popup shows shift type badge, 3) Requires 3 images (left glove, right glove, head camera), 4) After submission → auto-opens Start Collection form, 5) Second click (same kit+shift) → skips hardware check, goes directly to collection form. Test deployment: BNB 2 on March 20 (dep-202603201141586556) with KIT-03 and KIT-04.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/hardware-checks/status/{deployment_id}/{kit} returns shift-specific status (morning_completed, evening_completed, night_completed)
Backend: GET /api/hardware-checks/status with shift_type param returns specific shift status
Backend: POST /api/hardware-checks creates hardware check with shift_type field
Backend: Hardware check status updates to completed after submission
Backend: Duplicate hardware check for same kit+shift is rejected (400)
Backend: Different shift allows new hardware check for same kit
Backend: Deployment exists with morning_managers and assigned_kits
Frontend: Start Collection button click opens Hardware Check popup (first time)
Frontend: Hardware Check popup shows 'Morning Shift' badge
Frontend: Hardware Check popup shows 3 image upload fields (Left Glove, Right Glove, Head Cam)
Frontend: Hardware Check popup has 'Submit & Start' button
